title: Pack N Trade White 8-Inch Cake Box with 13mm Round Silver Drum – Durable 8×8×5″ Cake Box & Board Combo – Ideal for Birthday & Wedding Cakes, Cake Decorators & Home Bakers
features: 【STURDY & SECURE】This 8 × 8 × 5 inch cake box with drum is made from premium food-grade cardboard, ensuring safe transport and elegant presentation. It includes a 13 mm round silver cake drum for added stability and support.
【PROTECTIVE DRUM BASE】Comes with an 8‑inch diameter, 13 mm thick silver foil‑wrapped drum—grease‑proof and moisture resistant—providing a strong and elegant foundation for cakes.
【ELEGANT SILVER DESIGN】Featuring embossed silver foil on the drum adds a professional, eye-catching touch that enhances the presentation of any celebration cake—from birthdays to weddings.
【EASY ASSEMBLY】Both box and drum are quick and simple to assemble; box folds flat for storage and opens effortlessly, saving time for busy bakers and decorators.
【VERSATILE USE】Perfect for transporting, displaying, or gifting cakes of all types—ideal for cake drum use, bakery events, home celebrations, and cake decorators alike.
description: The 8 Inch White premium Cake Box & Round Silver Cake Drum Combo is the perfect solution for safe, elegant cake presentation and transportation. This set includes a robust round cake box measuring 8 × 8 × 5 inches, ideal for accommodating layer cakes, cupcakes, or pastries. The 13 mm thick silver round cake drum grease‑proof, providing a sturdy, moisture‑resistant foundation that supports even larger celebration cakes with ease. Made from food‑grade, disposable materials, the box is easy to assemble and features secure side panels for safe stacking and handling. The glossy silver foil‑wrapped drum enhances aesthetics while preventing leakage and keeping cakes pristine. Whether you're a professional cake decorator, bakery owner, or home baker, this combo set streamlines your packaging process—no more searching for matching drums or awkward handling. Simply insert your cake onto the drum and slide it into the box for a polished, ready‑to‑gift package. Ideal for birthdays, weddings, anniversaries, showers, and more. Maximize your efficiency and presentation with this high-quality combo—because every masterpiece deserves a perfect stage.
